figures.caption: Fig. 4. Fine-grained visualization of the hierarchy and semantic compositionality in the hypebolic space.
Fig. 3. Visualization of the learned hyperbolic space by HyNeuralMap-DeepSeek. Elements closer to the origin exhibit higher semantic hierarchy and coarser granularity.
Fig. 1. Conceptual comparisons of Euclidean embeddings and hyperbolic embeddings.
Table 3. Performance comparison of ablation study with DeepSeek backbone. All results are averaged across 4 subjects. Bold font signifies the best performance.
Fig. 2. An overview of the proposed HyNeuralMap framework.
Table 1. Multi-label prediction performance comparison across all subjects and embedding spaces. Bold font signifies the best average performance.
Table 2. Retrieval performance comparison across Euclidean and Hyperbolic spaces and VLMs. All results are averaged across 4 subjects. Bold font signifies the best avg. performance.
